<?php namespace Illuminate\Database; use RuntimeException; class ClassMorphViolationException extends RuntimeException { /** * The name of the affected Eloquent model. * * @var string */ public $model; /** * Create a new exception instance. * * @param object $model */ public function __construct($model) { $class = get_class($model); parent::__construct("No morph map defined for model [{$class}]."); $this->model = $class; } }
